channel.title: Model Picker on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Model Picker on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Kimi K2.7 Code is generally available in GitHub Copilot
item.description:
Kimi K2.7 Code is now generally available in GitHub Copilot. It is the first open-weight model available as a selectable option in the Copilot model picker.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Copilot cloud agent supports auto model selection
item.description:
Copilot cloud agent now supports Copilot auto model selection. Choosing Auto in the model picker lets Copilot pick the best available model based on system health and model availability.

  • Source: GitHub
